research_claim: An accepted local solve emits rank, residual, gluing, and commit evidence.
known_limitations: AcceptedWithWarnings is expected in the current implementation because post-local diagnostics remain warning-level.
The spanning forest plan is contract-only evidence; the reduced numeric task path is not yet implemented.
migration_policy: This B2 expected-output file is versioned with the solver version that produced it. If the solver report format changes, update this file and record the version bump in the B2 README.
